personality: 5 Brutalist Mobile structure infused with 6 Glass / Luxe premium surfaces
personality_one_liner: A high-contrast, data-dense fintech experience that treats financial metrics with command-center authority and premium glass overlays.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room. Exposed structure and visible spacing systems. Whitespace acts as content.

do's: Use glass for sticky headers over scrolling content
Use glass for bottom tab bar
Use glass for the primary featured dashboard card overlaid on the hero image
Ensure text on glass is fully readable by adding a translucent tinted base underneath (>=75% opacity in dark mode)
dont's: Never apply glass to body content, form fields, or standard list rows
Never rely on the underlying image for contrast without a scrim layer

screens.name: Auth
screens.purpose: Secure entry via PIN or Biometric App Lock.

states.error: Shake animation on PIN dots, stark red error message

screens.layout: Minimalist screen with the brand logo/name centered, an oversized mono PIN pad, and a biometric quick-action button below.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: A commanding overview of finances: today's expense, balances, and quick actions.

states.loading: Skeleton structure matching the high-contrast blocks
states.empty: No transactions yet. A stark mono illustration with a bold CTA to 'Log Kharcha'
states.error: Readable error message with a 'Retry' mono button

screens.layout: Hero image at the top with a glassmorphic primary balance card overlay. Below it, a segmented control or chunked grid of quick actions and a short list of recent transactions grouped by date.

screens.name: Transactions
screens.purpose: A chronological, filterable ledger of all income and expenses.

states.loading: Spinner centered in the list container
states.empty: Empty state illustration of a clear ledger with 'No recent activity'
states.error: Error message with a 'Reload ledger' button

screens.layout: Sticky glass header with a search bar and filter chips. A flat, edge-to-edge list grouped by date with swipe-to-delete/edit actions on each row. Add transaction FAB at the bottom right.

screens.name: Analytics
screens.purpose: Visual breakdown of spending and saving patterns.

states.empty: Chart outline with 0 data, prompt to add expenses
states.error: Failed to load insights, tap to retry

screens.layout: Segmented controls at the top (Income vs Expense). Large, minimalist Bar/Pie charts. A list of 'Top Merchants' beneath the charts in chunked cards.

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: User preferences, currency, and theme control.
screens.layout: Simple list layout with 1px structural dividers. Toggle switches exposed directly on the row. Sections for Currency, Theme, Backups, and Notifications.

dashboard_hero.alt: Abstract geometric background for the dashboard hero section

empty_transactions.alt: Minimalist paper and pencil on a surface, representing an empty expense tracker

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Blue and purple are completely banned. Use the defined 'Industrial Orange' for brand elements and Mint Green / Bright Red for financial status indicators.
Adopt a 'CRED-like' premium aesthetic: high contrast, stark backgrounds (charcoal black in dark mode), and chunked information architecture with soft glassmorphic overlays.
Typography must be strictly adhered to: SpaceGrotesk for display/headers and JetBrains Mono for ALL numeric data (balances, transaction amounts, dates). This drives the command-center feel.
Limit font weights to 400 and 500 across the entire application. Use font size, not weight, to establish visual hierarchy.
Always apply a top-to-bottom gradient scrim (transparent to >=75% surfaceInverse) between background imagery and text to guarantee WCAG compliance.
Implement swipeable list items for transactions (Add/Edit/Delete actions) using react-native-gesture-handler.
The primary action button (e.g., 'Add Kharcha') must float or be pinned to the bottom of the screen with a glass background behind it when content scrolls.
Implement Haptic feedback correctly for primary buttons, tab switching, toggles, and form submissions.
